title: BACAP Determination Edition
description: Determination Edition adds over 60 advancements to your Minecraft world, which act as tutorials for some of the BACAP advancements! This Datapack is recommended to people who prefer slow-paced gameplay and struggle with motivation and burn-outs.
body:
**This is an addon for the BlazeandCave's Advancement Pack and it requires said pack to run.**

Welcome to Determination Edition!
It adds over 60 advancements to your Minecraft world, which act as tutorials for some of the BACAP advancements! This Datapack is recommended to people who prefer slow-paced gameplay and struggle with motivation and burn-outs. That said, you'll complete every one of these advancements by the time you get Advancement Legend, so no new objectives to be scared about!

**You may find a documentation of all advancements** [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rXxI8CPxiE6cxjdNR-7w4tNoGvr7XAXFHzwI3A_9Y7c/edit?usp=sharing)**.**
**You may find a list of all trophies **[here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1FIdiRRW0jqtorBM8MYk8cXMC_tSjK2zXudUqUvswpjc/edit?usp=sharing)**.**

For this pack to work, put its file in the "datapacks" folder of your world. The file must be placed ABOVE BlazeandCave's Advancement Pack in the folder to work properly.
